hero.title: Resume Builder
hero.description: Build ATS-safe resume projects with organized sections, reusable resume items, preview, and completion review.
hero.note: Workflow ready for Astra review. Not approved live.

differences.title: Structured resume creation without leaving the platform
differences.description: Resume Builder follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app workflow pattern while adapting to the existing production schema.

items.title: Project workspace
items.description: Create one or more resume projects and select a clean template style.

items.title: Section structure
items.description: Organize profile, experience, education, skills, projects, and certifications as reusable sections.

items.title: Resume items
items.description: Add focused items with title, subtitle, description, and supporting metadata.

items.title: Preview and review
items.description: Preview enabled sections and review readiness before approval testing.

feel.title: A focused resume workflow
feel.description: Users move through a clear creation path while the shell, navigation, and authentication remain consistent.

items.title: Create the project
items.description: Start with the resume title and template.

items.title: Build the structure
items.description: Add enabled sections in the desired order.

items.title: Fill and review
items.description: Add resume items, preview the result, and review completion.

audiences.title: Who uses Resume Builder
audiences.description: Useful for people preparing structured resumes inside the Ansiversa platform.

items.title: Students
items.description: Create a clean first resume for internships and entry-level roles.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Keep career details organized for future applications.

resourceSection.title: Resume workflow essentials
resourceSection.description: The workflow keeps projects, sections, items, preview, and review connected.

items.title: Create the resume container.
items.description: Each resume starts as a project tied to the current user.

items.title: Shape the resume structure.
items.description: Enabled sections define what appears in the preview.

items.title: Add resume content.
items.description: Items hold the user-authored resume details.

groupedSection.title: Build a resume in five steps
groupedSection.description: Move from setup to review without leaving the mini-app.

items.name: Preview
items.description: Review enabled sections and their items.

technicalSection.title: Built on the existing production schema
technicalSection.description: Resume Builder adapts to the production database instead of replacing it.
items: Reuses existing ResumeProject, ResumeSection, and ResumeItem tables.
Apps catalog launchStatus remains comingSoon until Astra review and Partner approval.

finalCta.title: Ready to review Resume Builder?
finalCta.description: Open the workflow and verify project, section, item, preview, and review behavior.
